---
title: "Theory"
---

This section explains the math, frame conventions, and estimator-side assumptions used by the project.

Pages:

- [Conventions](conventions/): frame names, quaternion names, storage order, and sign choices.
- [Supported Input](supported-input/): what the project assumes about the pose, IMU, and GPS-like streams it works with.

Theory pages are organized by subsystem and explain how the estimator works. API details live in Reference.
